（谁说修仙小说的主角一定要有很多女孩，我偏不，我偏要写单女主。）
这是一个修仙世界，看点却是男主经过一番抉择下，最终选择一名女主的故事。
与自己同生共死的女孩们，一个是天才，一个是杀手。
自己的师父，表面看起来温柔体贴，但实际上占有欲极强。
冒险小队的三个女队友，一个是某家族的长女，一个是魔法森林的天才，还有一个宛如邻家女孩般。
换做是你，你怎么选？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2offb6cf2fbca2a3fee3cd863412450a1a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"洪方龙","author_id":"","book_id":"7386119544231693336","book_name":"这是一本无趣的小说","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#7088e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7386267571873399320","read_count":"11","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"119512"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"65","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,天才,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2offb6cf2fbca2a3fee3cd863412450a1a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779173445&x-signature=3UyGQoQWa8rX8UOzJBzGlV0Flcc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1403424005948988","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"21"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032014504560734A230F31693D088E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":132},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_repl
